### Summary

- **API endpoints**: 3/3 covered (healthz, task/start, stream)
- **Services**: 4/4 covered (session, planner, SSE service, SSE handler)
- **UI components**: 6/6 covered (TaskInput, TaskConfirmedBanner, ThinkingPanel, StepItem, ConfidenceBadge, FirebaseAuthProvider)
- **Hooks**: 1/1 covered (useSSEConsumer)
- **Store**: 1/1 covered (aria-store)
- **API client**: 1/1 covered (task.ts)

## New Tests Added

1. **aria-backend/tests/test_sse_service.py** — 17 tests covering emit_event (canonical envelope, broadcast, queue-full, isolation), subscribe (yielding, terminal events, cleanup), unsubscribe (specific queue, all queues, edge cases)
2. **aria-frontend/src/lib/api/task.test.ts** — 6 tests covering fetch call shape, success/error responses, network failure, default URL fallback
3. **aria-frontend/src/lib/store/aria-store.test.ts** — 14 tests covering all three slices initial state, setState mutations, immer integration, resetAllSlices
4. **aria-frontend/src/components/providers/firebase-auth-provider.test.tsx** — 6 tests covering render null, auth subscription/unsubscription, uid/idToken propagation, signInAnonymously trigger
5. **aria-frontend/src/components/session/TaskConfirmedBanner.test.tsx** — 5 tests covering conditional rendering, content display, styling assertions

## Next Steps

- Run tests in CI (GitHub Actions deploy pipeline)
- Epic 3 (Executor + Browser Automation) will need Playwright E2E tests
- Epic 4 (Voice + Barge-in) will need WebSocket and audio tests
